prompt: Use my uploaded portrait only as the identity reference for facial features, hairstyle, hairline, skin tone, and overall real-person likeness. Create a realistic retro editorial portrait of me lying upside down on a large round brown vintage leather armchair, legs raised naturally upward, one hand near the face and the other resting beside a cream-colored vintage typewriter. Use a warm beige studio background, soft indoor lighting, slight film-photo texture, playful relaxed pose, and a vertical 9:16 composition. Do not copy the clothing from the reference exactly. Choose a more suitable outfit based on my uploaded portrait and personal appearance, keeping it casual, stylish, youthful, and visually harmonious with the retro chair and typewriter scene. The face must remain recognizable and naturally integrated, not like a face swap. Keep realistic skin texture, natural shadows, believable body proportions, and real camera perspective. No watermark, no logo, no text.
